sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107794" key="u(perpera/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερπεράω</orth>, <sense id="n107794.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pass beyond,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τὸν σφιγκτῆρα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.43</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
